text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Beneficiary Plan Election and Auto-Assignment │ October 2021 │ V 1.3 10 

ENRLMT_TYPE_CD 

LABEL: Beneficiary Part D Plan Enrollment Type Code 

DESCRIPTION: This variable contains the enrollment type code, which is used to identify the source/mechanism of 
the Part D enrollment 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 

FILE(S): Part D Beneficiary Plan Election file 

VALUES: A = Part D Auto Enrolled by CMS
